description_long: This is a single right-handed glove designed with a high cuff and a form-fitting silhouette, likely intended for protective or sports use. The glove features a predominantly light-colored body with contrasting dark sections on the index and middle fingers, as well as a patch on the palm and a strap area on the wrist. The material appears to be a combination of synthetic fabric and rubber, providing both flexibility and grip. The glove has a textured wrist area, possibly for added support or secure fit, and a smooth finish on the main body. There are no visible brand markings or logos, and the design is modern and functional. The closure appears to be a velcro strap on the wrist for easy adjustment.
description: A modern, high-cuff glove with light and dark contrasting sections, featuring a velcro wrist strap and textured support areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the palm, velcro wrist strap, and dark patches on the index and middle fingers.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the glove's profile, the raised cuff, and the contour of the fingers.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the back of the hand, the dark palm patch, and the overall glove shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the thumb side, wrist texture, and the glove's ergonomic curvature.
